APE
Features

Solana's #1 Memecoin Terminal

Trade memecoins safely with APE's unique vault technology. Enjoy the lowest 0.5% fees, MEV protection, and seamless social logins.

Connect Telegram

Signless MEV Protection

Execute trades instantly without signing transactions, protected by Jito's MEV infrastructure.

Social Login Security

MPC-based AA program with social logins - no seed phrases needed. Trade securely from any device.

Real-time Analytics

Professional trading tools with real-time charts, market data, and transaction monitoring.

The Most Advanced Solana Trading Platform

APE.Pro combines cutting-edge features for the best Solana trading experience:

  • MPC based AA program with social logins (powered by Web3Auth)
  • Best price swaps with the lowest platform fees (0.5%) on top of intelligent fee optimisations (powered by Jupiter)
  • Signless MEV protected swaps (powered by Jito)
  • Real-time charts, transactions, data, everything!

Key Trading Features

  • New Tokens Feed: View tokens launched in the past 24h
  • Quick Buys & Sells: Trade directly from the feed
  • Token Checklist: Verify mint authority, freeze authority, LP status
  • Hunt Gems Feed: Track new and emerging tokens
  • Real-time Charts: Price and market cap visualization
  • Position Management: Monitor PnL and portfolio balances

Popular Trading Pairs

Trade popular Solana tokens with deep liquidity:

  • SOL/USDC - Solana's native token
  • BONK/SOL - Popular Solana memecoin
  • JUP/SOL - Jupiter's governance token
  • New memecoin launches
  • Emerging DeFi tokens

Security Features

  • Social & Web3 login methods
  • MPC-secured accounts
  • Smart Wallet Program
  • Automatic transaction retries
  • Intelligent fee optimization
